Jessica Monroe
Phoenix, AZ

Summary
Detail-oriented warehouse associate with over 3 years of experience in fast-paced environments. Proven ability to manage time efficiently and maintain high accuracy in order fulfillment. Comfortable standing for extended periods and lifting heavy items. Strong communication skills and a commitment to team collaboration.

Experience
Warehouse Associate
ABC Logistics, Phoenix, AZ  
March 2021 - Present  
- Efficiently picked and packed orders for shipment, ensuring accuracy and quality control.
- Operated pallet jacks and hand trucks to move items within the warehouse.
- Maintained a clean and organized workspace, following safety protocols and procedures.

Inventory Clerk  
XYZ Distribution, Tempe, AZ  
June 2019 - February 2021  
- Assisted in inventory management and stock replenishment, contributing to a 15% reduction in stock discrepancies.
- Conducted regular audits to verify inventory counts and report variances.
- Supported the packing team during peak seasons, demonstrating flexibility and teamwork.
